LanguageData.UB_SNS_Prisoner.title: Escapee
LanguageData.UB_SNS_Prisoner.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was arrested for illegally smuggling organs past intergalactic lines, trying to avoid the 'organ tax'. During transport to an urbworld prison planet, [PAWN_possessive] transport shuttle experienced total Johnson-Tanaka Drive failure. During the following panic, [PAWN_nameDef] managed to get to an emergency ejection pod and escape.
